events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young and still drumming! Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic beat?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the absolute legend, Sir Brian May! From stadium anthems to astrophysics, is there anything this man can't do?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still rocking stages worldwide! Wishing a very happy birthday to the inimitable Sir Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched in the US
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched in the United States, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video aired.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star?
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV burst onto screens with The Buggles' iconic first video. Did it really kill the radio star, or just give us more ways to love music?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, launching them to superstardom.

angles.name: Definitely A Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of the 90s. What's your favourite track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, kicked off on this day in 1969 in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Three Days of Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for Woodstock – three days that defined a generation. What's the one performance you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who died in 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today since we lost the King, Elvis Presley. His music and legacy continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who passed away in 1970 at the age of 27.

angles.name: Legendary Guitarist
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since the world lost the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix. His influence on music is still felt today. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', in the UK on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Crossing The Road To History
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history, but what's your favourite track from inside?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman and rock icon, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Legend
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude have powered The Pretenders for decades. What's your favourite track from her?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and solo artist, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star Birthday
angles.copy: Fifty-four years young! Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite track he's lent his iconic vocals to?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' single
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic anthem for peace, 'Imagine', was released as a single on this day in 1971 in the US.

angles.name: Imagine All The People
angles.copy: Fifty-five years ago, John Lennon gave us 'Imagine' – a song that still resonates globally. What does this timeless anthem mean to you?

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the revolutionary first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, promising '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Pocket Full Of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? Twenty-five years ago today, Apple unveiled the device that changed how we listen to music forever. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to thrilling gadgets, what's your favourite 007 moment or song? License to thrill, indeed.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the visionary musician and co-founder of The Beatles, John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the profound impact of John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire. What's your favourite Lennon lyric?
